title: Physics-Prior Masked Multi-Stage Search for Fast-Charge Protocol Design Under Thermal Stress
notes: The final LaTeX log is free of warnings, undefined references, and overfull or underfull box messages.
The compiled PDF includes the three paper-main figures, three tables, and the bibliography.
remaining_risks: The layout uses a generic article template rather than a venue-specific format.
Submission-facing polish may still want a tighter first-page wording sweep and a broader related-work comparison matrix.
